text.title: langchain-memory Selection & Wiring Procedure
text.summary: Six deterministic steps converting a conversation-profile.yaml into a validated decision-record + wiring snippet.

step.name: parse-profile
step.action: Load YAML; reject if any required field is missing; coerce ints; normalise recall_pattern to {recency,semantic,mixed}.
step.decision-gate: If profile invalid → abort with structured error; do not guess defaults.

step.name: select-memory-type
step.action: Walk content/06-decision-tree.xml: branch on expected_turns first, then recall_pattern, then entity_focus.
step.output: memory_type ∈ {buffer, summary, vector, entity} + winning rule id
step.decision-gate: If expected_turns < 10 AND recall_pattern=recency → buffer (rule r1).

step.name: enumerate-rejected
step.action: For each of the three losing alternatives, write a one-sentence reason citing the driver that disqualified it.
step.output: rejected[] with ≥1 entry per non-winning option

step.name: select-store-backend
step.action: Map memory_type → compatible backends: buffer/summary → redis|postgres, vector → chroma|pinecone, entity → postgres. If store_backend=in-memory and target≠dev → upgrade to redis.

step.name: emit-wiring
step.action: Render templates/wiring-snippet.py with the chosen backend class; set ttl_seconds; force session_id_strategy to uuid unless caller explicitly passed hashed-user-id.

step.name: emit-record-and-validate
step.action: Assemble decision-record JSON; run scripts/validate-langchain-memory.py against 02-output-contract.xml schema.
step.output: final decision-record.json; exit 0 only on validator pass
step.decision-gate: If validator fails → fix and re-emit, do not commit.
